ops.body: All three consumers shipped green 2026-07-13: getaway 0.9.0 (c41e943a + CI-pin fix 8f874078 — dropped run PostToolUse/Stop, killing the live Stop double-dispatch), cc-context 0.14.0 (224e588b + sed fix 6b524fd2, v0.14.0 binary release assets verified live), cc-present 0.8.1 (4114c91f + python-pin fix 6009204f + sed fix a4ca7b71, v0.8.0+v0.8.1 releases cut, provisioning proven end-to-end). Each: attach-only --isolated hooks.json, object-form dependency >=9.9.0, marketplace allowlist, pinned `pack lint` in CI (pin required: bare uvx served stale pre-9.9.0 envs in CI two different ways — cached tool env, and python-version backtracking). repo-bootstrap reference rewritten (cc-skills dcb46193, plugin 0.50.0). Collateral finds: bare-sed version extraction breaks under dependencies blocks (fleet task ea7f2664; upstream template fixed in cc-skills d8f21c50); getaway README's install snippet was also stale. Remaining criterion: live single-Stop-dispatch smoke (in flight).
